meaning: 梅德斯通[英国英格兰东南部城市](肯特郡首府)
examples: Xing Zhi Middle school has many sister schools around the world, one of which is Maidstone Grammar school in south-east England.
A municipal borough of southeast England north of Maidstone. The Royal School of Military Engineering is here. Population, 95,900.
The attempt, carried out by a team from UK's Sunday Times newspaper, involved driving from Maidstone in Kent to the South of France and back.
At Maidstone Crown Court Martin pleaded guilty to nine counts in total of computer-related offences.
Martin had pleaded guilty to nine offences at a previous hearing at Maidstone Crown Court.
